seo.title: Curry Noodle Salad - keeps for a long time in the fridge - Marinda Kook

html: This is one of those salads that will always be with us.  Whether you make it small-scale for a few guests or large-scale for a function  – it stays a winner.  Make it on a Friday and it lasts the whole weekend if someone doesn't eat it in the night.

recipe.title: Curry Noodle Salad – keeps for a long time in the fridge
recipe.author: Marinda Engelbrecht

image.alt: Kerrie noodleslaai  - hou vir lank in die yskas

items: 1 green/red/yellow pepper finely sliced (choose your colour)

steps: Cook the noodles until soft but not mushy, drain well.
Cut your onion and pepper into nice small blocks and mix it through the noodles.
Mix the rest of the ingredients in a bowl.
Stir it through your noodles.
Leave it in the fridge overnight. The longer it sits, the tastier it gets.

notes: This is a delicious side dish for a braai or just to enjoy on its own.
